rows.description: Computary Rectors a 2do Die Novembris 1761 ad eundem Diem Revolutum 1762.
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s single header row. This accurately represents the single logical title spanning two physical lines. Its transcription 'Computary Rectors' and 'Revolutum' is more accurate than `gpt-5-mini` which split the header and had minor transcription errors.
rows.section_header: Computary Rectors a 2do Die Novembris 1761 ad eundem Diem Revolutum 1762.

rows.notes: Adopted `gpt-5-mini`'s description as it is a more accurate transcription ('Arrearagia' vs 'Arrearagie' from `gemini-flash`). Both agree on row type.

rows.description: Longwitterham pro Diem: an: Inst. Mid. 1761.
rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description as more accurate ('Longwitterham', 'Inst.', 'Mid.'). Pounds and shillings matched. Visually confirmed pence is 11, matching `gemini-flash` over `gpt-5-mini`'s 3.
rows.english_description: Arrear rent received from Long Wittenham for the year 1761.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear rent received from Long Wittenham for the year 1761, amounting to £23 19s 11d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description ('Merton' vs 'Merston' from `gpt-5-mini`). Monetary amounts are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Arrear rent received from Merton covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear rent received from Merton covering two years, amounting to £10 5s 6d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description ('Garsington' vs 'Godington' from `gpt-5-mini`). Pounds and shillings matched. Visually confirmed pence is 4 and 0.75 (3/4), matching `gemini-flash` over `gpt-5-mini`'s 6.
rows.english_description: Arrear receipts from the rectory of Garsington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear receipts from the rectory of Garsington, amounting to £10 14s 4¾d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description ('Grotheruan' vs 'Trethewan' from `gpt-5-mini`). Pounds and shillings matched. Visually confirmed pence is 0 and 0.25 (1/4). Both extractors were incorrect on the pence/fraction: `gemini-flash` missed the fraction, `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read 4 and 0.5.
rows.english_description: Arrear rent received from Grotheruan covering three years and part of a year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear rent received from Grotheruan covering three years and part of a year, amounting to £19 10s 0¼d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description ('Kidlington' vs 'Ridlington' from `gpt-5-mini`) and monetary values. `gemini-flash` correctly identified the 0.75 pence fraction, which `gpt-5-mini` missed.
rows.english_description: Arrear income from the Kidlington mills for two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrear income from the Kidlington mills for two years, amounting to £16 13s 0¾d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description ('Garsington Molineux' vs 'Garryton Molloway' from `gpt-5-mini`). Monetary values are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from the Garsington mill (Molineux).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from the Garsington mill (Molineux), amounting to £3 18s 4½d.

rows.notes: Description matched. Pounds, shillings, and fraction matched. Visually confirmed pence is 4, matching `gemini-flash` over `gpt-5-mini`'s 2. The 'Ditto' context also suggests the same amount as the preceding entry.
rows.english_description: Second/ditto annual payment corresponding to the Garsington mill entry above.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second/ditto annual payment corresponding to the Garsington mill entry above, amounting to £3 18s 4½d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description as slightly more accurate for the difficult name ('Grintihale' vs 'Gritshulle' from `gpt-5-mini`). Monetary values are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Three-year payment (arrears) from Napper of Grintihale.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Three-year payment (arrears) from Napper of Grintihale, amounting to £11 9s 8d.

rows.notes: Monetary values are consistent across both and visually confirmed. Description combined from both extractors: `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Newington' is better than `gemini-flash`'s 'Nympton', and `gemini-flash`'s 'Tempus' is better than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Temp'. Removed 'pro' from `gpt-5-mini` which was not present in the image.
rows.english_description: Annual temporal (land) payment from South Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual temporal (land) payment from South Newington, amounting to £1 3s 10½d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description and monetary values. `gpt-5-mini` misread all monetary values (0, 9, 6 vs correct 9, 6, 8) and also the description ('Lidlam Couryn'). Visually confirmed `gemini-flash`'s reading.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Conyngs at Ladham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Conyngs at Ladham, amounting to £9 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s description and monetary values. `gpt-5-mini` misread all monetary values (0, 8, 6 vs correct 8, 6, 8) and had a minor description difference ('Meriton Ditto'). Visually confirmed `gemini-flash`'s reading.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Merton (ditto terms: annual).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Merton (ditto terms: annual), amounting to £8 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Consensus on description and monetary values, visually confirmed. `gemini-flash` provided an excellent detailed note regarding a calculated arithmetic discrepancy in the original ledger, indicating careful analysis.
Adopted `gpt-5-mini`'s description as it is a more accurate transcription ('Newing' vs 'Neunig' from `gemini-flash`). Both agree on row type and no amounts.

Consensus on description and monetary values, visually confirmed. Decided on 'entry' row type (from `gemini-flash`) as it appears to be an initial amount or running balance for the section, rather than a sum of subsequent entries (as implied by `gpt-5-mini`'s 'total' type).
